general.name: Google Drive Intel PPPC and Kernel Extensions
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>76583B48-F645-4808-B24A-21B02DA0ABC8</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>76583B48-F645-4808-B24A-21B02DA0ABC8</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Google Drive Intel PPPC and Kernel Extensions</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadRemovalDisallowed</key><true/><key>PayloadScope</key><string>System</string><key>PayloadContent</key><array><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>0F96B2C8-5176-4A42-8628-3A336E5351C5</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.TCC.configuration-profile-policy</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>SADA</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>0F96B2C8-5176-4A42-8628-3A336E5351C5</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Privacy Preferences Policy Control</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>Services</key><dict><key>SystemPolicySysAdminFiles</key><array><dict><key>Identifier</key><string>com.google.drivefs</string><key>CodeRequirement</key><string>identifier "com.google.drivefs" and anchor apple generic and certificate 1[field.1.2.840.113635.100.6.2.6] /* exists */ and certificate leaf[field.1.2.840.113635.100.6.1.13] /* exists */ and certificate leaf[subject.OU] = EQHXZ8M8AV</string><key>IdentifierType</key><string>bundleID</string><key>StaticCode</key><integer>0</integer><key>Allowed</key><integer>1</integer></dict></array><key>SystemPolicyAllFiles</key><array><dict><key>Identifier</key><string>com.google.drivefs</string><key>CodeRequirement</key><string>identifier "com.google.drivefs" and anchor apple generic and certificate 1[field.1.2.840.113635.100.6.2.6] /* exists */ and certificate leaf[field.1.2.840.113635.100.6.1.13] /* exists */ and certificate leaf[subject.OU] = EQHXZ8M8AV</string><key>IdentifierType</key><string>bundleID</string><key>StaticCode</key><integer>0</integer><key>Allowed</key><integer>1</integer></dict></array></dict></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>8D84AAC8-E6BE-4CC3-9438-1D31BAB26BB4</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.syspolicy.kernel-extension-policy</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>SADA</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>8D84AAC8-E6BE-4CC3-9438-1D31BAB26BB4</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Approved Kernel Extensions</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>AllowUserOverrides</key><true/><key>AllowNonAdminUserApprovals</key><true/><key>AllowedKernelExtensions</key><dict><key>EQHXZ8M8AV</key><array><string>com.google.drivefs.filesystems.dfsfuse</string></array></dict></dict></array></dict></plist>
